reason: The role carries significant emotional intensity from managing acute trauma, end-of-life care, and delivering life-altering diagnoses to families. Sustainability is compromised by extreme 'productivity metrics' that create a constant mental treadmill, alongside physical tolls like chronic back pain from bedside ergonomics. The high legal liability regarding patient aspiration and the resulting mental exhaustion lead many practitioners to view full-time clinical work as unsustainable long-term.
